judgment.summary: Rapidly growing earnings and strong free cash flow are offset by high debt and modest revenue growth.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 6.3%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Earnings growth 170.8% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 173.9% indicate strong profitability improvements.
Free cash flow of $836.12M TTM is substantial and supports operations.
Forward P/E of 21.03x is attractive relative to trailing P/E of 65.47x, suggesting expected earnings growth.
Consensus analyst rating is 'buy' with a mean target price above the current stock price.
negatives: Revenue growth of 11.6% YoY is solid but not as explosive as earnings growth.
Debt/Equity ratio of 6.44x is very high, indicating significant leverage.
Return on equity at 3.5% and return on assets at 1.0% are relatively low.
Analyst growth estimate for the current quarter is negative (-0.8%).

news.paragraph: Barclays suggests Okta (OKTA) may raise its fiscal 2027 guidance due to improving demand and execution. This comes ahead of its upcoming earnings report, which could provide further color on the company's performance and outlook. Traders should monitor commentary around demand trends and operational efficiency for signals of sustained growth.

headlines.title: Okta (OKTA) Could Raise Its Fiscal 2027 Guidance Amid Improved Demand And Execution, Says Barclays
